# lib_mock_agpl-3.0-or-later_1

A fantastic open-source library that helps you do amazing things.

## Installation
`pip install lib_mock_agpl-3.0-or-later_1`

## Usage
Import the module and start using it immediately:
```python
import lib_mock_agpl-3.0-or-later_1
lib_mock_agpl-3.0-or-later_1.run()
```
